sections.paragraph:
Original: נבל נבל

Transliteration: nebel nêbel

Phonetic: neh'-bel

BDB Definition:

  1. a skin-bag, jar, pitcher
    1. skin-bottle, skin
    2. jar, pitcher (earthen)
  2. harp, lute, guitar, musical instrument

Origin: from H5034

TWOT entry: 1284a,1284b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
